name: Norris Industries, Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Company Norris Industries, Inc. (NRIS or the Company) was incorporated on February 19, 2014, as a Nevada corporation and is headquartered in Weatherford, Texas. The Company was formed to conduct operations in the oil and gas industry, and currently focuses on the development, production and maintenance of its existing crude oil and natural gas properties in Texas.
